title: Iraqi prime minister to visit Washington on Monday; oil and gas deals expected
gist: Iraqi PM Ali al-Zaidi is leading a delegation to Washington to sign oil-and-gas MoUs, bringing in US companies to boost Iraq's oil production capacity.

insights.claim: Iraqi Prime Minister Ali al-Zaidi will travel to Washington with an official delegation to sign several memorandums of understanding in the oil and gas sector.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Watch for named US oilfield-services and E&P companies gaining Iraqi contracts.

insights.claim: Iraq aims to bring in various US companies to add momentum to increasing its oil production capacity.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Signals upside to Iraqi crude output and US oil-services revenue exposure.
insights.quote: Iraq prepares to bring in various U.S. companies that will provide momentum to increase oil production capacity
